programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a peaceful, grown-up evening of dinner and conversation... a long-needed moms' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours - what could go wrong? Moms' Night Out is an endearing, true-to-life family comedy.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: The House Next Door 2: Meet The Blacks
programme.desc: When best selling author Carl Black moves his family back to his childhood home, he must team up with oddball neighbors to do battle with a pimp, who may or may not be an actual vampire.

programme.title: Loverboy
programme.desc: When it comes to romance, Patrick Dempsey delivers in this madcap comedy. Working his way through college as a pizza delivery boy, Dempsey learns a few lessons in love from bored housewives who are looking for more than anchovies on their pizza.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.sub-title: Oily To Bed, Oily To Rise
programme.desc: The Stooges are tramps looking for handouts. Although the boys are down and out, Curly seems to get everything he wishes for. After some trouble with a farmer, the boys come across an abandoned car, one of Curly's wishes. The car actually belongs to some con men who have just gypped the widow Jenkins out of her land. The boys wind up at the Mrs. Jenkins house just in time for a free meal. To repay Mrs. Jenkins the boys try to fix her well and instead unleash an oil geyser. Learning that Mrs. Jenkins has been swindled, the boys go to retrieve the deed before it can be recorded. They find the bad guys and after a wild fight recover the deed. The boys return the deed to Mrs. Jenkins and marry her daughters; April, May and June.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Punch-drunk Love
programme.desc: Barry Egan (Adam Sandler), the owner of a struggling vanity plungers company, falls in love with Lena Leonard (Emily Watson), a woman his sister is trying to set him up with. On the run from a gang of thugs, Barry travels to Hawaii, using the frequent flier mile coupons clipped from several cartons of pudding cups, to meet up with this girl of his dreams.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog travels 400 miles in search of her owner.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Whatever It Takes (2000)
programme.desc: Best friends and neighbors, Ryan Woodman and Maggie Carter, are four weeks away from the prom, and they've agreed to go together if they don't have real dates. Then Chris, a cool guy from the football team, offers to help Ryan connect with Ashley, a popular blond. In exchange, a la Cyrano, Chris needs Ryan's help to get close to Maggie. Ryan makes the deal, helps the dastardly Chris play Maggie, takes advantage of Ashley's lack of self-esteem, loses his values, makes fun of his geeky friends, and falls in Maggie's estimation. Maggie is fooled by Chris, poised to be his next score. Before prom night is over, with its Titanic theme, will Ryan stop sinking?

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog travels 400 miles in search of her owner.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Whatever It Takes (2000)
programme.desc: Best friends and neighbors, Ryan Woodman and Maggie Carter, are four weeks away from the prom, and they've agreed to go together if they don't have real dates. Then Chris, a cool guy from the football team, offers to help Ryan connect with Ashley, a popular blond. In exchange, a la Cyrano, Chris needs Ryan's help to get close to Maggie. Ryan makes the deal, helps the dastardly Chris play Maggie, takes advantage of Ashley's lack of self-esteem, loses his values, makes fun of his geeky friends, and falls in Maggie's estimation. Maggie is fooled by Chris, poised to be his next score. Before prom night is over, with its Titanic theme, will Ryan stop sinking?

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: When unproduced Broadway playwright Skip Donahue (Gene Wilder) and his best friend, out-of-work actor Harry Monroe (Richard Pryor), are both fired from their dead-end jobs, they abandon Broadway and set out in their battered van to find fame and fortune in Hollywood. But the van breaks down on the way, and they're forced to take jobs as dancing woodpeckers in a bank promotion. Their troubles are just beginning, as their feathered costumes are swiped by a pair of hoods who use them in a holdup, and Skip and Harry are soon carted off to prison. There they try to keep their sanity and their lives as they deal with a sadistic warden, a hulking mass-murderer and the inter-prison rodeo, which may provide them with the opportunity to walk away -- but at a considerable sacrifice.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Larry and Louise Tate have been married for sixteen years and have no children. Louise asks Samantha to go with her to an obstetrician as tests have shown she is going to be a mother. Louise tells Samantha she is afraid to tell Larry since she believes he hates children. Larry, visiting his dentist at the medical center, sees Louise and Samantha enter the obstetrician's office. Thinking Samantha is going to have a baby, he tells Darrin, but cautions him not to say anything until Samantha tells him. In a reverie, Darrin visualizes his children as little witches. He comes to with a sinking feeling. Samantha invites the Tates to dinner. Both Larry and Darrin hover over Samantha, warning her not to exert herself. Louise is all but forgotten, but makes several unsuccessful attempts to tell Larry that he is to be a father. Finally, Samantha tells Larry. He is overjoyed. Although Darrin doesn't tell Samantha about his reverie, he is reassured when she tells him she hopes they have a child who looks just like him.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Samantha's friend, Gertrude, a nice, plain-looking girl expresses her envy of the happiness Samantha has found in marriage. Although Darrin tries to avoid getting mixed up in matchmaking, Samantha persuades him to bring Kermit, a handsome artist, home to dinner to meet Gertrude. Kermit falls for Gertrude. Although Samantha will mot admit it, Darrin suspects Gertrude is a witch and tries to break up her romance with Kermit. Darrin arranges a meeting at a nightspot for Kermit with Susan, a former girl friend. There, Samantha uses witchcraft to get Susan into an argument with Kermit. Susan storms out, unable to recall what has happened. When Gertrude arrives, according to Samantha's plan, Kermit proposes to her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Darrin's parents pay their first visit to the Stephens home, Darrin's mother, Phyllis, hopes to find that his wife is a poor housekeeper. Soon after, Samantha's Aunt Clara comes down the chimney for an unexpected visit. Darrin is worried about the kind of impression Aunt Clara will make on his parents, but agrees with Samantha that they must make Aunt Clara feel welcome. Determined to help Samantha make a hit with her in-laws, Aunt Clara uses her witchcraft to whip up a feast for dinner. Thinking that Samantha has done the cooking, Phyllis becomes quite upset. Although Samantha warns him to be tactful, Darrin makes Aunt Clara feel she is not wanted. After Aunt Clara's de-parture, Samantha gets into an argument with Darrin, during which Phyllis learns Aunt Clara cooked the dinner. When Samantha admits she is not a good housekeeper, Phyllis, who felt she was being pushed aside, knows she is going to love her daughter-in-law. Darrin persuades Aunt Clare to return and the evening ends happily for all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Seven year old Tommy, who lives in an orphanage, is happy to spend Christmas with Gladys and Abner Kravitz. Six year old Michael, also an orphan, derides Tommy's belief is Santa Claus. When Samantha and Darrin bring him home for the holidays, their efforts to get Michael to share in the festivities of the season fail. After Michael admits he would believe in Santa Claus if he really existed, Samantha takes Michael and Darrin on her broomstick to the North Pole, where Michael meets Santa Claus. Later, back at home Darrin and Michael awake. Although both feel they have dreamed the trip, Michael now believes in Santa Claus. Gladys overhears Michael tell Tommy he has met Santa Claus. When she tries to pin Tommy down, he denies that Michael had ever mentioned it. Mrs. Grange, the director of the orphanage, comes to the Stephens home with George and Sarah Johnson. At the Kravitz home, both Gladys and Abner, who are about to return Tommy to the orphanage, express their wish to have someone like Tommy permanently. When Michael leaves with Mr. and Mrs. Johnson, Samantha and Darrin know Michael has found two loving parents.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: The members of the Hospital Fund Auxiliary appoint Samantha Entertainment Chairman for the group's bazaar. Limited to spending fifty dollars, Samantha hires Zeno, a broken down magician who has taken to drink. Because of this, his assistant, Roxie Ames, has left the act. Using her gift of magic, Samantha makes Zeno the hit of the show. As a result, Zeno gets a job on TV. Zeno pleads with Samantha to help him. Assisted by Samantha, Zeno runs through a very successful rehearsal. Just before the show goes on the air, Roxie appears and injects herself into the act. Hogging the show, Roxie kills Zeno' s act and his con-fidence. She admits she returned just to get a regular spot on TV herself. Samantha turns Roxie into a comic prop for Zeno. After Zeno's successful performance, Darrin tells Samantha that his client has booked Zeno for the next thirteen weeks. Darrin attempts some magic on his own. When he succeeds, he is not certain whether his skill or Samantha's is responsible.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Darrin sprains his ankle and is confined to bed with his foot in a cast. Wearying of running up and down stairs on errands for Darrin, Samantha suggests he use her power of witchcraft during the emergency. Endora warns Samantha that she is making a mistake. After his initial wishes are granted, Darrin, as Endora had predicted, becomes drunk with power. After showering Samantha with gifts, Darrin not only decides to use his power to get a larger home, but also tells Larry Tate, his boss, that he is retiring so that he and Samantha can take a trip around the world. Samantha's initial plan to stop Darrin by showering him with new luxuries fails. Then Darrin gives Samantha flowers and a wristwatch he has purchased with his own money. From Samantha's happy reaction, Darrin realizes these gifts mean more to her than all the others. Samantha happily agrees to his request that she take back his powers of witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: After arranging to meet Samantha to celebrate their six month anniversary, Darrin arrives at his office to meet Margaret Marshall, chairman of the board of a cosmetics firm. Margaret, a stunning woman in her late thirties, successful both with men and in business, insists that Darrin fly to Chicago that night to complete the quarter million dollar campaign he had planned for her company. Fumbling out of the anniversary arrangements with Samantha, Darrin flies to Chicago and meets Margaret, who has become quite interested in him, aboard her yacht. There, Darrin sees a cat and feels it may be Samantha, egged on by her mother, Endora, to fly to Chicago to check on his activities. While Darrin evades Margaret's advances, a pelican arrives on the scene. Although both Margaret and Captain Kelly feel there is something strange in Darrin's reactions to the animals, Margaret, realizing Darrin is truly in love with his wife, ac-cepts his advertising campaign. Greeted by Samantha at home, Darrin is reassured that the cat he has brought with him is not his wife. However, when the pelican arrives, Darrin is uncertain whether it might not be Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: After Endora promises to curb her witchery for the even-ing, Samantha arranges a dinner for Darrin's parents and her mother to meet. Darrin is fearful of the results. Father Stephens has just retired and feels lost and insecure. Endora, being utterly charming, as she has promised Samantha, plays up to Father. Father once more feels life is worth living, but Mother Stephens becomes jealous. Before Mother is through, she is sure Endora wants to take Father from her. She asks Darrin for the name of a divorce lawyer. Darrin and Samantha work feverishly to save the marriage. Despite their efforts, Mother takes a train to Arizona and Father boards a plane on the first step of a world trip. Samantha asks Endora's help. Using her witchcraft, Endora brings both plane and train to Angel Falls, where Father had proposed to Mother years before. In the romantic setting, both realize they are much younger than they thought.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: When Darrin refuses to allow Samantha to act as matron of honor at cousin's wedding in Egypt, Endora tells him he's in trouble. Immediately Darrin starts having problems with his campaign to get the Woolfe Brothers Department Store account. despite Darrin's protests, Larry Tate gives him an assistant. The assistant, young Gideon Whitsett, soon maneuvers himself into being regarded as a brilliant young man. On the make, Gideon soon has Woolfe looking to him for ideas, which he has stolen from Darrin. Darrin is sure that Gideon is a warlock whom Endora has assigned to take his job. When everything else fails, Samantha decides to stop Gideon herself. Using witchcraft, Samantha gets Gideon to reveal the ruthless maneuvers he has been using to get Darrin's job. Darrin, who overhears the conversation, finally realizes Gideon is not a warlock. A right to the jaw puts Gideon out of action. His confidence restored, Darrin sells Mr. Woolfe on his idea for a successful campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Darrin's agency is unable to find a model for the "Jewel of the East" campaign. Darrin hopes they'll be able to do so, if only to bolster the confidence of Wally Ames, who is sub-stituting for the company's top photographer. Samantha trans-forms the Stephens' cat into a beautiful Oriental girl named Ling Ling. Everyone flips over her and the campaign is wrapped up. Darrin invites Larry and Louise Tate and Wally to a victory celebration at his home. Wally, intrigued by Ling Ling's feline grace, brings her along. Samantha's efforts to make Ling Ling give up Wally fail. To avoid a catastrophe, Samantha is forced to tell Darrin and asks him to warn Wally off, but Wally only becomes angry with Darrin. Samantha spikes Ling Ling's drink with truth serum. Wally bows out when Ling Ling displays her true cat nature. Later, Gladys Kravitz calls her husband when she sees Ling Ling clad in a mink coat, lapping milk from a saucer. By the time Abner gets to the window, Samantha has returned Ling Ling to her original state, and Abner gives his wife a spoonful of her nerve medicine.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Roger tells Jeannie that he has arranged a double date for Tony and himself with two beauty queens. Before Roger can tell Tony, Jeannie turns him into a French poodle. The poodle is taken to the dog pound. There, Tony pays five dollars for a Great Dane he thinks is Roger.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Watching a TV western, Tony longs for the days when a man had to be strong to survive. Jeannie blinks and Tony finds he is a U.S. Marshal in a frontier town. Confronted by a bang of outlaws led by Bull Welch, Tony is saved by Horace Sedgewick, the town banker.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: How To Be A Genie In 10 Easy Lessons
programme.desc: Tony complains that Jeannie is constantly getting him into trouble. She replies she's not had much practice at being a genie. Tony takes Roger's suggestion that Jeannie needs lessors in her craft and buys "The Arabian Nights."

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Jeannie's jealousy takes over when Tony insists on keeping a date with a friend. She blinks and Tony finds himself behind bars in his living room. Feeling she has been successful in keeping Tony from his date, she releases him the following morning.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Never Had A Birthday, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Jeannie tells Tony she never had a birthday party since she does not know when she was born. Tony sends her back home to find out. At the base, Gen. Peterson and Dr. Bellows introduce Tony to Eric, a huge computer.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Never Had A Birthday, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Tony and Roger make another attempt to have Eric, the com-puter figure out Jeannie's birthday. Since Tony is scheduled to leave for Alaska on a mission, Dr. Bellows uses Tony' s office while his own is being painted.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: With the football season in full swing, Tony is constantly glued to the TV set. Jeannie realizes she must do something to get his attention and decides to make Tony jealous.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony tells Jeannie that each year the American Air Force puts on a TV talent show with contestants from each base. Jeannie insists that Tony enter since they need a trophy for the mantle.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Lover In The World
programme.desc: Roger cancels a double date with Tony and Jeannie. Surmising that Roger has been unable to get a date for himself, Jeannie blinks. Immediately Roger's phone gets busy with calls from girls who turned him down, and a score of new ones, begging for dates.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Because Jeannie has run up a staggering food bill, Tony is unable to join Roger in buying a sailboat. Jeannie goes to the bank with Tony to borrow money for his share.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony complains that he has no free time because Jeannie waits him to spend every spare moment with her. Roger suggests he find Jeannie a hobby, but she turns down all his suggestions, until she mentions that she could write a book on raising children.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Invention In The World
programme.desc: Jeannie's unique spot remover almost lands Dr. Bellows is Iceland.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Jeannie's duplicate Tony sets off a spy hunt.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: You Can't Arrest Me, I Don't Have A Driver's License
programme.desc: Jeannie's driving lands Tony in court.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.sub-title: One Of Our Bottles Is Missing
programme.desc: Tony almost loses Jeannie when Mrs. Bellows takes her bottle.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Jeannie saves Tony from being grounded.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Roger tells Jeannie that he has arranged a double date for Tony and himself with two beauty queens. Before Roger can tell Tony, Jeannie turns him into a French poodle. The poodle is taken to the dog pound. There, Tony pays five dollars for a Great Dane he thinks is Roger.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they 'll get away with the perfect heist. They 're wrong.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: Superstar Johnny Depp gives one of the most captivating performances of his career in this grippingpsychological thriller.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Dragon Wars
programme.desc: Meet Buraki, the vicious, 200-meter long Imoogi serpent from ancient Korea. His army includes giant lizards with missile launchers, flying dragons, soldiers bred for evil and mega-intelligent dinosaurs. Together, they will destroy Los Angeles and possibly the world unless reincarnated warriors Ethan and Sarah can outrun them and resurrect the Good Imoogi, Buraki's ancient nemesis.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions. Welcome to Hollywood Homicide - the only profession where a guy can come to work hungry, horny, thirsty, and broke, and resolve all four by the end of the watch.

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

Academy Award Winner Kevin Spacey (The Usual Suspects) and young Hollywood super star Kate Boswoth (Superman Returns) star in this clever & adreniline filled heist film. An MIT math whiz is recruited by a teacher to join a specialized team of card counters. They break away from their mentor before casino security finally catches up with them. Based on book "Bringing Down the House." It co-stars Lawrence Fishburne (Matrix Trilogy).

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Flatliners (1990)
programme.desc: Kiefer Sutherland and Julia Roberts lead a talented group of medical students on a dangerous journey to the other side of death... and back.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage is a private detective hired to investigate the source of a crudely shot eight millimeter film. The investigation sends him down a gritty and frightening path into society's darkest corners.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles

programme.title: The 6th Day

programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Better Call Saul

programme.desc: Jimmy and Kim build a legal firewall with help from Huell; Kim sets things straight with her clients as Jimmy is compromised by his; Gus calms troubled waters in service of his plot to build an empire; Mike does damage control.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: When a simple errand for a client goes sideways, Jimmy is pushed to the limit; Mike takes measures to contain the wrath of the cartel; Lalo gets an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Now doing business as “Saul Goodman,” Jimmy unveils an unorthodox strategy for client development that tests Kim’s tolerance of his new legal persona. Lalo searches for the mysterious “Michael,” only to discover a problem within his own operation.

programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.title: Marc by Sofia
programme.desc: Sofia Coppola captures the genius and singular universe of iconic American fashion designer Marc Jacobs.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Undertone
programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Ocean's Eight
programme.desc: Debbie Ocean assembles an all-female team of thieves and specialists for a heist during the Met Gala, aiming for the $150 million worth of diamonds around the neck of world-famous actress Daphne Kluger.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Mia (Jane Levy), a drug addict, is determined to kick the habit. To that end, she asks her brother, David (Shiloh Fernandez), his girlfriend, Natalie (Elizabeth Blackmore) and their friends Olivia (Jessica Lucas) and Eric (Lou Taylor Pucci) to accompany her to their family's remote forest cabin to help her through withdrawal. Eric finds a mysterious Book of the Dead at the cabin and reads aloud from it, awakening an ancient demon. All hell breaks loose when the malevolent entity possesses Mia.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfort to the rest of postwar England.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Tracing the evolution of Burning Man, from its anarchic countercultural roots in San Francisco to the 80,000-person desert gathering it has become.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock. When his social media posts start blowing up, so does his life and the lives of everyone following him. As a stock tip becomes a movement, everyone gets wealthy -- until the billionaires fight back and both sides find their worlds turned upside down.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Tracing the evolution of Burning Man, from its anarchic countercultural roots in San Francisco to the 80,000-person desert gathering it has become.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: Undertone
programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: The Mystery of D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Unravelling the mystery surrounding D.B. Cooper, who boarded a Northwest Orient Airlines plane in November 1971 and hijacked the flight while it was still on the tarmac.

programme.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
programme.desc: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

programme.title: The Welcome Table
programme.desc: Investigation into the impact of the ecological disaster on everyday people's lives by looking at the intersection of climate and immigration.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Scorpion's Revenge
programme.desc: The champions of Outworld and Earthrealm fight to the death in a brutal tournament that determines the fate of Earth.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
programme.desc: The heroes must travel to Outworld to defend Earthrealm as Scorpion searches for the ancient Kamidogu before it's used to resurrect the One Being.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Snow Blind
programme.desc: When Kano and Black Dragon mercenaries become determined to take over Earthrealm, undisciplined Kenshi seeks tutelage from retired Kuai Liang to stop Kano from decimating all of Earthrealm.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Cage Match
programme.desc: Action superstar Johnny Cage squares off against a sinister secret society that's plotting a nefarious scheme. However, the brutal fight against the bloodthirsty warriors of the Netherrealm is just the beginning.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: The Strangers
programme.desc: Kristen (Liv Tyler) and James (Scott Speedman) are expecting a relaxing weekend at a family vacation home, but their stay turns out to be anything but peaceful. First, a mysterious and dangerous woman arrives at the door while James is out on an errand. When he returns, he accidentally kills his friend Mike (Glenn Howerton), mistaking him for an intruder. And then real danger does show up -- in the form of three masked torturers, leaving Kristen and James struggling for survival.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Life of the Party
programme.desc: When her husband suddenly dumps her, longtime and dedicated housewife Deanna turns regret into reset by going back to college. Unfortunately, Deanna winds up at the same school as her less-than-thrilled daughter. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the outspoken new student soon finds her true self while fully embracing all the fun, freedom and frat boys that she can handle.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Marc by Sofia

programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: The Bride!

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As Natalie Portman, Kara Nortman, and Julie Uhrman begin the process of building Angel City Football Club from the ground up ahead of its first season in the NWSL, they realize bucking the status quo can be a tightrope walk.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As players and staff deal with the stress of living up to the club's ambitious goals, ACFC kicks off their inaugural NWSL season at home in front of a vibrant, star-studded crowd.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: Tensions mount as ACFC searches for solutions in their roster while fighting for a playoff spot during the final weeks of their inaugural season.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. When Grumio finds a baby behind some bins while doing the recycling and takes it home to raise as his own, Stylax uses the infant to strike up a relationship with an attractive young wet nurse - meanwhile, Marcus tries to avoid seeing a painfully boring one-woman play that Cynthia is starring in.

programme.title: Transaction
programme.desc: Lively sitcom. When Liv reveals a terrible secret after returning from medical leave for her surgery, Simon and his team must lie their way through a fancy New Year's Eve gala and try to make it to midnight before Liv's shame is unveiled - and all under the watchful eye of a familiar villain.

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a charmingly dysfunctional police training college. When a sexting incident derails Danni's wedding, Connor provides a shoulder to cry on - meanwhile, Bob has become aware that Melanie is not around and is bereft. A frustrated Julie demands that Melanie sorts it out, explaining that Bob can't live without her - Bob is also on tenterhooks as to whether he has a child. When Bob gets the DNA test results back, he must come to terms with the implications - elsewhere, Daz has a proposal for Melanie, but she has well and truly moved on. As Aunty Nooch psychs Paul up for the mission - it's too important to make any mistakes - Bob and Julie get an apology from Divisional HQ that a new Head of Training has still not been appointed. Since Cunningham has been there under false pretences all along, they take great delight in exacting revenge on the impostor... but have they acted too rashly? In a thrilling climax on the big day, a terrified Paul takes part in the criminal handover...

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Tucker from the East Midlands is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies.

programme.title: Georgia & Tommy: Happy Essex After
programme.desc: Reality series. Georgia has a last day in Ibiza on her hen party, but she is exhausted and really starts to feel the stress when her nan announces that she might not make it to the wedding - meanwhile, Tommy finally gets round to sorting his suit, but his eye for detail may mean that he has left it too late to have the perfect outfit. With the big day looming, Tommy sets off for Mallorca by car with Monkey, the bridesmaids' dresses and both of Georgia's wedding dresses -as Georgia opts for what she thinks is the easiest route by plane, she realises that it isn't as stress-free as she hoped. With the wedding party all in Mallorca, the final countdown is on as Ben and Mark try to convince Tommy to have a stag party before Georgia and her wedding dresses reach the wedding day.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The gang returns with a bang and there's no shortage of glam, gossip or drama. Chloe B and Lockie are the talk of the town when news of their secret tryst spreads. Meanwhile, Gatsby hopes to take things to the next level with Dani, and after turning 30, Diags is realising that with age comes responsibility, but is he ready to take over the family business? Plus, a newly single Amy feels she's lost her Essex sparkle so fellow singleton Saff helps her get it back.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Shannon is loving the single life as Jenn preps for her wedding, Gina finds her home life returning to centre, Emily reveals a heartbreaking family issue, Tamra opens up about her past trauma in therapy, Heather deals with problems at her Beverly Hills mansion, and Katie finds herself at odds with some of the ladies as they question her association with bloggers.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Aesthetic pharmacist Armineh is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Armineh will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds?

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: On a final Year 11 retreat, Mr Meacher and Mr Dunn plan one last send-off before GCSEs, complete with awards and letters to future selves, but the students quickly derail it. The mood shifts when a volatile intruder, Sean, arrives desperate to get inside, holding Mr Dunn hostage in his car. As panic spreads, the students confront fears, regrets and confessions, believing they may not survive the night. When Disneyland Darren finally contacts Reece, the group assume the police are coming - only for Darren himself to arrive as the world's worst rescuer, making everything worse. As a stand-off spirals into tension and chaos, Reece's unexpected connection to Sean is revealed.

Steve and Hayley are away for the summer so Francine teaches Roger to look after himself, hoping this will give her more time to spend with Stan. When Roger moves out, Stan fears that Francine will realise how boring he is and leave him, so he devises a plan to bring Roger back.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Bob gets a call from Teddy, who has accidentally got himself stuck inside a client's walk-in safe and needs Bob to come rescue him so the client won't find out and fire him, matters are complicated by the fact that Teddy doesn't know where he is - meanwhile, Linda and the kids are visited by a victorious basketball team and decide to make a giant celebratory hamburger called the Beef-hemoth for them.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Big Bob picks up his grandchildren for a day at the wharf in spite of Bob's worries that his father's pessimism about the world will eventually affect them negatively, the Belcher kids sneak into a booth that controls a fortune-telling clam attraction and get accidentally locked inside - meanwhile, Linda struggles with helping Teddy take a friendly photo of himself for a handyman services website.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Lynna is a single mother with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams - Brian and Sarah deliver, and then some, with a hangout that is suitable for use nearly all year round, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Stephen Mulhern as Dori gets her chance to take on the Banker - she may choose to take an offer from the Banker in exchange for what's in her box or hold out until the end and be rewarded.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Fashion entrepreneur Caz hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Will any of them shine?

programme.title: Olivia & Alex: Parenthood
programme.desc: Love Island’s Olivia & Alex Bowen invite us behind the scenes of family life as they juggle careers and parenting, while struggling to find quality time together as a couple. After early scans raised the excitement of expecting twins, the episode begins with an emotional appearance on Loose Women, where they describe their experience of Vanishing Twin Syndrome. As the birth of their daughter grows closer, Olivia feels the strain of daily life, while Alex’s decision to enter a bodybuilding competition couldn’t come at a busier time. Their 3-year-old son Abel provides endless laughs and challenges, from chaotic early mornings, to heart-melting moments at his swimming lessons. Through all the ups and downs, Olivia and Alex’s playful banter shines, especially when Alex’s carelessness threatens to derail their romantic Paris getaway. Honest, warm and full of heart, this is not just reality TV — it’s a candid, funny and deeply relatable look at love, loss and modern family life.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Amber and Dan are happy and settled in their relationship - all is good apart from the continuing awkwardness with the Sims sisters, so will Dan and Amber be ready to accept when Demi offers an olive branch in the form of a birthday invite, and will Chloe Sims be able to be in the same room with them without things becoming frosty once again? Elsewhere, Gatsby and Dani's relationship is going from strength to strength and Gatsby is finally ready to pop the question and ask Dani to be his girlfriend - this needs to involve a big gesture in true Gatsby style, but will he be able to pull off the surprise of his life and secure himself a girlfriend? Meanwhile, self-confessed agony aunt Saff puts her skills to good use on her own radio show, budding actor Lockie has landed a part in a film and is buzzing to move forward in his acting career, and entrepreneur Chloe Brockett is ready to take the fashion world by storm... but will Amy Childs give her seal of approval to her new brand?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Lisa tries to repair relationships while Bronwyn defends herself against mounting accusations, and the group's loyalties become even more divided ahead of their trip.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Heather finds herself negotiating a birthday conundrum as two of her guests refuse to be in the same room, Jenn and Katie support their children as they move in and out, Shannon introduces her dating 'bench' to Emily and Gina, and Katie's apology attempt to Shannon is met with an explosive reaction.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Kia from Crewe is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Kia will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of anatomy, baby products, songs, water brands and more.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's been five months since lovebirds Gatsby and Dani started seeing each other, and now it's time to make things official - their relationship is flying high, quite literally, as it's time for Gatsby to pop the question, but will some on-ground turbulence by way of Chloe Brockett bring their relationship down to the ground with a bump? Meanwhile, Demi is a hopeless romantic and loves being in love - having just celebrated her 25th birthday, she is however still confused when it comes to her sexuality. After cooling things off with Diags and Roman, it's time for some soul-searching with the help of Demi's sisters - will it make her feelings clearer, or will she realise that there aren't any hard or fast rules when it comes to sexuality? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have entered a new phase of their relationship and have a new addition to the family... baby Oliver the cockapoo! Are Essex's glamorous power couple ready for poochy parenthood, or will harsh realities soon be realised?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: The very first episode of the drama series adapted from the series of novels by James Runcie. 1953: Sidney Chambers is vicar of Grantchester and a much-admired parish priest - he has just spent a glorious morning in the company of Amanda Kendall, the woman with whom he is secretly in love. Racing to church, Sidney arrives just in time to conduct the funeral of a local solicitor, a death which appears to be the result of suicide. Sidney comforts the man's young widow Hildegard Staunton but is soon called away by the glamorous Pamela Morton - Pamela reveals that she was having an affair with the dead man and has reason to believe that he was murdered. Sidney starts to investigate and soon comes up against the grumpy local DI Geordie Keating, who does not appreciate the vicar sticking his oar in. As Sidney begins to uncover evidence that the suicide was staged, his own world is shaken apart when he receives news that Amanda has got engaged.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and based on the novels by James Runcie about vicar and amateur sleuth Sidney Chambers. Sidney is hounded by his sister Jen into attending Amanda's engagement dinner, but the evening is ruined when Amanda's engagement ring goes missing and Jen's boyfriend Johnny is accused of stealing it. Worse is to follow - the next morning, Geordie calls Sidney to say that one of the guests at the dinner party has been found dead.

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: Two-part crime drama. Walker is up for his dream job of commander and North is at the peak of her career heading up her first murder inquiry, but a nightmare erupts at home which threatens to destroy them both.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the death of a young woman in a suspicious fire that rips through a coastal holiday park - when Vera discovers that the victim was locked in her cabin, she realises that this is more than just an accident. Supported by her trusted team, Vera must use all her tenacity and instinct to expose the deep rift at the heart of a fractured family and ultimately discover the truth behind the woman's tragic fate.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series adapted from the novels by James Runcie about the town where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. When Guy and Amanda ask Sidney to perform their wedding ceremony, the heartbroken vicar takes solace in a bottle. In spite of his disappointment, Sidney helps Isabel Livingstone to prepare for her wedding to Arthur Evans despite her mother's wishes. However, when her mother Daisy is found dead, Sidney finds himself being dragged into the investigation reluctantly. Suspicions are raised when Arthur and Isabel push for a fast cremation of the body; what is it that they do not want to be discovered? Things take a darker turn when Daisy's sister Gladys is also found dead from a suspected poisoning.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series adapted from the novels by James Runcie about a Cambridgeshire village where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. When Dominic Taylor is found stabbed soon after a suspicious fire at his house, DC Atkins takes charge of the case. Meanwhile, Sidney learns that Geordie's baby son is gravely ill, and his increasingly erratic behaviour means that Geordie's thoughts are far from the job in hand. Sidney's life is further complicated when glamorous widow Hildegard Staunton returns to Cambridge and Sidney realises that his feelings for her might be growing.

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: The concluding part of this case of the crime drama. When a mother is snatched from a local wood in full view of her young daughter and friend, Pat North takes charge of the investigation and is amazed when hulking and swarthy man Bob Brickman immediately confesses to abduction, rape and murder - however, there is no apparent motive, no body, and only two traumatized children as witnesses. North struggles to make sense of what is an increasingly complicated case, but Walker is more concerned with his imminent interview for commander, the return of his estranged brother, and disturbing revelations about his ex-wife's new boyfriend.

Meanwhile, Russian Chess Master Leonid Vorodin, is staying at the Hall for a tournament but all he really wants to do is defect. A rash of recent burglaries also test the power of the Aidensfield police force.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Trouble flares in Aidensfield when a farmer accuses the auctioneer, Giles Sutton, of fixing cattle prices. Vernon spots a huge money-making scheme in bottled water, but things are not as they seem following tests on the spring water. Meanwhile, Jackie has a bombshell to drop about her relationship with Adrian Miller. Featuring a guest appearance by John Nettles.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Faith Alexander arrives in Midsomer Deverell to meet her long-lost uncle Rex Masters, but Rex has told everyone that Faith's entire family was wiped out in a plane crash and he has disappeared - thanks to Miles King, an old friend who does Rex's gardening, news spreads quickly as Rex's cook Eileen Carnack, cleaner Janet Bailey, and Janet's fiance Jeremy Thacker rush to his home at Stonecroft House. Faith is anxious and can't understand how Rex has photographs of her when they haven't met following a 40-year family feud - after Barnaby asks Jones to investigate the disappearance, Rex's body is found in a river below Crofter's Weir. As Barnaby returns to Rex's study and finds some important clues in a set of risque photographs from the 1960s, can he get to the bottom of the tangled relationships stretching across the generations, learn the truth about Rex's life of mischief-making, and identify the killer?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series adapted from the novels by James Runcie about a Cambridgeshire village where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. Sidney takes Geordie on a night out to Johnny Johnson's London jazz club - when Amanda turns up unexpectedly, Sidney and Amanda settle into a night of dancing, but their reverie is interrupted by a scream from backstage. Johnny's sister Claudette has been murdered, leaving everyone close to her devastated. As all the leads seem to come back to the violent past of Claudette's father Archie, recriminations within the family begin to play out. Meanwhile, when Sidney's feelings for Amanda are exposed, the fallout leads the vicar to make a terrible decision that he instantly regrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Six-part drama series set in 1953 and adapted from the novels by James Runcie about the town where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. Tragedy strikes as a policeman is killed and Geordie is shot and badly wounded; believing that the police are on the wrong track, Sidney starts his own investigation. It soon becomes clear that the killer's motives stretch back many years to events that took place during the Second World War. As Sidney wrestles with his own demons about the war, everything seems to be hurtling out of control for the young vicar. With no Amanda to turn to - and with his guilt over Hildegard running rampant - will he be able to keep his head for long enough to track down the killer, and will Sidney be able to admit his true feelings to Amanda before her wedding to Guy?

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: First in a two-part crime drama. programme.desc: Doctor Doolittle star Samantha Eggar guest stars in this episode of the classic US action drama series. Psychic Laura Bennett foresees her own murder in a vision and enlists Thomas's help to prevent it happening, but she unwittingly endangers his life in the process.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is understandably taken aback to see his old friend Mac, who was supposedly killed a year previously in a car explosion, alive and well and working as a US Navy chaplain.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. A brilliant diamond robbery is being planned and the gang behind it needs a getaway driver, forcing Dempsey to create mayhem in the streets of London in a stolen car and Makepeace to play catch with a hand grenade.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken and Harry are shocked when they delve into the affairs of a local landlord who is trying to evict good tenants, and Laura and Rocky teach a schoolteacher who is also a bully a lesson.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions are enlisted to help a world-famous doctor who has been put under house arrest.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Rotator tries to live up to its reputation and prevent another bot from winning and joining the champions fighting for the Golden Bolt.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas learns that TC has crashed just off the coast while flying his helicopter to a neighbouring island, he dives to examine the wreckage in search of clues to what caused his now-hospitalised friend to lose control.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. The Hawaii assistant DA hires Thomas to gather evidence against a man accused of killing his wife, but the result of his investigation presents him with a king-sized dilemma.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Suzi Quatro and Elizabeth Sladen guest star in this adventure of the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Dempsey is stalked by a psychopathic admirer who obsesses over him, hates Makepeace for being with him, and has a deadly way of showing her affection.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken and the gang are kept on their toes when they spend a night as security detail at a ballet and discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Strange things happen to Sharron when she goes on holiday to Cornwall and becomes suspicious of happenings at a local manor.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Arthur and Terry join the horsey set when Arthur tries to offload some pottery figures onto an antiques dealer with a passion for racing.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys into the swamps of southern Africa to find a piranha-like fish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy Wade heads into Central America in search of a giant fish.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole enters his first-ever motorbike race and goes training with legendary British Superbike racer Chris 'The Stalker' Walker, then goes off-road riding with Dakar Rally competitor Lyndon Poskitt before trying his hand at second-hand bike dealing - we also get an update on the 1970 Triumph Bonneville which is in bits as Henry and Pete the Restorer make their own wheels.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Iconic action drama. Codenamed Maverick, impetuous daredevil Navy ace Pete Mitchell is accepted into Top Gun, Miramar's elite fighter school - once there, the impulsive young pilot will have to do battle against other hotshot pilots including Iceman, a brilliant and highly-competitive fellow student. Maverick must give his all, but his father's mysterious and untimely demise still haunts him - will he be able to prove his worth to Charlie, the flying school's no-nonsense astrophysics instructor?

programme.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
programme.desc: Sci-fi prequel series. A threat to an idyllic planet reunites Pike with the lost love of his life - to protect her and a scientific holy child from a conspiracy, the captain offers his help and is forced to face unresolved feelings from his past.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash on a remote tropical island in the South Pacific Ocean. Out of 324 people on board the doomed Oceanic Flight 815 en route between Sydney and Los Angeles, there are 71 initial survivors spread across three sections of the crash site - their continuing existence is threatened by a number of entities on the island including polar bears and largely unseen creatures referred to as the Others. At the heart of the action are surgeon Jack Shephard, convict Kate Austen, con artist James 'Sawyer' Ford, former military communications officer Sayid Jarrah, intellectual John Locke, and the larger-than-life Hugo 'Hurley' Reyes.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neill presents MSUK from Snetterton with racing from the F4 and MINI Challenge Trophy.

programme.title: World Rally Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Round Nine of the season - the WRC Delfi Rally Estonia. Based in Tartu, the event serves up a mix of wide, high-speed forest roads and narrower technical sections. [S]

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly takes an oversized trailer to Prudhoe, a task she failed the previous season, while Alex Debogorski picks up a load of fish from Red Sucker Lake and heads for Winnipeg. Rick Yemm is forced to reverse down a treacherously icy road after missing a turning, while in Fairbanks, rookie Maya Seiber is tested on a 3D simulator, which all drivers have to conquer before they can be let loose on testing terrain.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli. [S]
